name: LED Mirror - Room Essentials™: Rectangular Vanity Mirror with Lights, 1X Magnification, Spot Clean, Lithium Ion Battery Included
description:
Bring convenience to anytime grooming or touch-ups with this LED Mirror from Room Essentials™. Designed in a rectangular shape with rounded corners, this lighted mirror features a plastic shell that lights up with a touch button on the front. Featuring an adjustable design that allows you to change the viewing angle, it runs on an in-built lithium ion battery with a back USB port for easy charging.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
